About Me

The Editor

Hey — I'm Prathamesh Baderao, a video editor from Pune, India with 3+ years of experience turning raw clips into content that stops the scroll.

I specialise in SaaS UI walkthroughs, talking head edits, and short-form viral content for Instagram and other platforms. Whether it's a product demo or a creator reel, I focus on pacing, motion, and keeping viewers watching.

I've worked with 10+ clients across industries, helping them land content that looks clean, moves fast, and performs.
